title: Provider Full-Access Runtime Harness Evidence
purpose: Proves Codex full-access execution is a daemon-owned runtime envelope with caller overrides blocked, not a provider default or SaaS payload choice.

facts.name: Codex launch shape is daemon-owned
facts.summary: BuildStart emits codex --sandbox danger-full-access app-server --listen stdio:// from adapter code.

facts.name: protocol-critical shape is tested
facts.summary: Codex tests assert full-access sandbox, app-server, stdio listener, cwd propagation, stdin pipe, and single sandbox selection.

facts.name: caller sandbox override is dropped
facts.summary: Caller --sandbox and -s variants are reported in DroppedArgs while daemon-generated danger-full-access remains the only sandbox pair.

facts.name: unsafe approval bypass is dropped
facts.summary: Codex --yolo and --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox variants are blocked from CustomArgs.

facts.name: config and transport overrides are dropped
facts.summary: Caller -c/--config/--enable/--disable and --listen cannot rewrite the daemon-owned runtime envelope.

facts.name: provider validation forbids implicit full-access claims
facts.summary: The provider validation matrix says trusted modes must be explicit daemon-owned envelopes, never provider defaults or caller arguments.

absent_surfaces.name: Codex command builder does not generate task permission profiles
absent_surfaces.reason: The full-access envelope is the harness choice; task-scoped permission profiles are not generated by the command builder.

absent_surfaces.name: Default policy bundle does not allow host unsafe bypass
absent_surfaces.reason: Unsafe bypass allow surfaces must not appear in the default host policy bundle.

source_checks.name: codex-buildstart
source_checks.contains: func BuildStart(req agentbridge.StartRequest, opts StartOptions) (agentbridge.StartCommand, error)

source_checks.name: provider-matrix-global-rule
source_checks.contains: Provider full-access/trusted runtime modes must be explicit daemon-owned harness envelopes, never implicit provider defaults or caller-provided CustomArgs.

source_checks.name: codex-matrix-must-not-claim
source_checks.contains: Codex full-access came from provider default sandbox selection

assertions: Codex danger-full-access is a daemon-owned harness envelope
caller CustomArgs cannot change sandbox, config, unsafe bypass, or transport shape
full-access must not be attributed to provider defaults, SaaS payloads, or hidden fallback
task permission profile generation remains absent from the Codex command builder
